title.en: The extra-dimensional technique created by Ye T...

content.en:
The extra-dimensional technique created by Ye Tian is based on the super-dimensional power, and only by comprehending the true extra-dimensional power can it be cast.

And this extradimensional art can control superdimensional dao soldiers, but it also needs to pay a certain price.

The price Ye Tian paid was to consume one-third of the Eternal Dao Seed Origin in his body and a very serious injury, so that he could urge this fragment of the Extradimensional Dao Soldier to burst out with a killing blow.

This extra-dimensional technique was named by Ye Tian as a super-dimensional control technique.

"Try the power of the Extradimensional Control Technique and this Extradimensional Dao Soldier Fragment!"

Death Void.

Ye Tian came here, no matter how the extradimensional storm hit him, he couldn't help him at all.

He had a total of two replica bodies, one of which was holding a fragment of an extradimensional Dao soldier.

"Let's get started!"

He used the super-dimensional control technique, and with the blessing of the super-dimensional power, he controlled this fragment of the super-dimensional Dao soldier, and the origin of the eternal Dao seed in his body was being quickly absorbed and consumed by it.

"Kill!"

The fragment of the extradimensional dao soldier crossed everything at a speed beyond his concept, killing another replica body.

The other copy body also used all its strength to urge the power of the super dimension, and even used some super dimensional secret treasures to defend, and the super dimensional techniques of layer by layer defense also broke out with all their might.

However.

Poof!

Many defenses were pierced by the fragments of the Super Dimensional Dao Soldier, and all the defenses were like paper paste, and even many Super Dimensional Secret Treasures were instantly penetrated.

And his replica body was also penetrated, and his physical body collapsed and died in an instant.

One-hit kill!

"What a terrible attack, just one blow killed a copy of my body in seconds, even if I urge more super secret treasures, I'm afraid I can't stop it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He felt that the power of this blow was enough to severely damage the half-step extradimensional realm, and even kill the weaker half-step extradimensional realm.

I have to say that the Extra-Dimensional Dao Soldier is worthy of being a weapon that can only be used in the extra-dimensional realm, and it is far from being comparable to the Extra-Dimensional Secret Treasure.

Fortunately, this is a fragment, if it is a real extradimensional Dao soldier, he probably can't urge it anyway.

Of course, in order to urge this extra-dimensional dao soldier, his replica body was very seriously damaged, and the price paid was very high.

But if it is a real life-and-death fight, no matter how big the price is, he will have to bear it, not to mention that he can change his body again.

"This fragment of a super-dimensional soldier is my hole card, and I have to keep it well, maybe it will be useful when it happens. Ye Tian said darkly.

Obtaining this piece of super dimensional dao soldier is broken, Ye Tian is in a good mood.

He had to thank Taiqiong Mountain, otherwise where would he get such a treasure?

As for guarding Taiqiong Mountain and maintaining the extra-dimensional formation, it was hardly a cost to him.

It can be said that this time it was purely earned for nothing.

Of course, for Taiqiong Mountain, even if it is a precious treasure, if it is exchanged for the immortality of Taiqiong Mountain, it is also a good deal.

......

Time passes.

Gradually, another long time passed.

Before you know it, the extradimensional storm has been going on for a period of extradimensional years.

For Ye Tian, an extradimensional era is also a long time.

Now, his strength has grown again.

For example, his Eternal Dao Seed had once again reached his current limit, and he was qualified to condense the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit.

And under the tempering of the extradimensional power, his physical body is already extremely terrifying.

"The extradimensional storm is not over yet, but it has already shown the limit of weakness, and it seems that it will not be long before the extradimensional storm will disappear completely!" Ye Tian said darkly.

During this period, he did not continue to explore extradimensional storms.

After all, he has already comprehended the true power of the extra-dimensional, there is no need to take risks for the sake of the extra-dimensional elves, in case he really offends a super-dimensional elf in a certain extra-dimensional realm, maybe he will directly kill the human race.

In that case, it would be a disaster for the Terrans.

So, he didn't need to continue the adventure.

Next, he only needs to wait for the extradimensional storm to end, and then continue to wait for the arrival of the Ice Ghost Organization, destroy the Ice Ghost Organization, and leave the 7362 Territory with the help of the Ice Ghost Organization's formation, so as to contact the wider territory.

Especially Taiqiong Mountain, the pinnacle realm gods of Taiqiong Mountain are really no longer panicking.

After all, even if Ye Tian left now, they would be able to use this broken extradimensional formation to survive the final period of the extradimensional storm.

Of course.

Since Ye Tian had accepted the benefits, he would naturally protect Taiqiong Mountain until the day the extradimensional storm ended.

Gradually, another 300 billion years passed. []

this day.

The extradimensional storm has finally dissipated completely.

......

Eternal borders.

Except for a few territories that were shrouded in extradimensional formations, all other places had turned into nothingness.

A pinnacle realm god and a high-level realm god appeared, and looking at the current miserable state of the eternal realm, he was immediately full of emotion.

However, the self-recovery ability of the Eternal Realm is okay, as long as the Origin is not too seriously damaged, the Eternal Realm will gradually recover.

Really.

After a period of time, the land of the eternal realm was condensed, and treasure lands were born everywhere, but compared to before, the treasure lands now are very ordinary treasure lands, and they are of no use to the gods of the realm.

Death Void.

When Ye Tian came here, he saw that the current Death Void was full of nothingness, and many things had been destroyed by the extradimensional storm, and there was no danger even with the current Death Void.

Of course.

The pinnacle realm gods didn't dare to explore the Death Void casually, after all, the resources that still existed were definitely full of great dangers, after all, even the extradimensional storm didn't destroy those resources, could it be simple?

If there are some peak realm gods who really can't resist the temptation, it is their own business to die.

At this time, Ye Tian did not explore the Death Void, but continued to retreat and cultivate penance, and began to impact the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit.

His foundation is already extremely solid, and it should not be difficult to break through (good Li Zhao).

Soon, he used the power of extradimensional power to break through.

Condensing the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, he is not 100% sure, but there is still no problem with more than ninety percent.

Within the Eternal Dao Seed, the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit gradually began to condense under the effect of extradimensional power.

The whole process was very easy and there was no danger.

In the end, Ye Tian successfully condensed the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit.

Rumble!!!!

With the condensation of the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, his cultivation began to break through, his physical body and Eternal Dao Seed began to transform, and his strength was also increasing.

After a long time, the transformation was completed, and his strength skyrocketed again.

"'Condensing the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, my cultivation has far surpassed those peak realm gods among the supreme forces, maybe I am the first peak realm god to condense my cultivation to the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit!'"

Ye Tian muttered.
